Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Void Icon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon manifested the Void Icon.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The Void Icon is an object that requires insight to touch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon reached out for the Void Icon.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The Void Icon has a good connection to spatial abilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon aligned himself to the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Touching the Void Icon allows Lindon to feel everything around him as vessels that can be drained or material that can be consumed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — The Void Icon is a realm or concept mentioned by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon uses the Void Icon to extend his perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon was open to the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The hunger in the labyrinth reminded Ziel of the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — The fury of the Void Icon faded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The process of pulling something into existence from nothingness resonates with the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon felt an easy resonance with the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon can sense the suction of the ancient authority in the labyrinth through the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen has a connection to the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — The Void Icon resonates with the hunger all around Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — The Void Icon has a yawning hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon felt something overwhelming from the Void Icon.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Void Icon has the purview to remove alterations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon reaches out to the Void Icon for comfort and support.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — The Void Icon can be used to strip away illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Void Icon is an endless abyss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Void Icon wiped out the dream.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's anger resonates with the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon uses the Void Icon for concealment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Void Icon is useful for removing obstacles and hiding things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Void Icon can be used to shroud possibilities from Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon is looking for information regarding the Void Icon in the Dreamway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — The Void Icon has no domain over physical power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — The Void Icon can empower a dragon's breath.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Void Icon provides information about Lindon's position in the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon had contact with the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Void Icon matches Lindon's eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — An indistinct Void Icon hovered over Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — The Void Icon's power is felt with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — The Void Icon appears above Lindon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Void Icon has the ability to shroud possible futures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon glared at Reigan Shen with the intensity of the Void and Dragon Icons combined.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Void Icon whispered around Lindon, clouding his future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Void Icon affects Lindon's thoughts and leaves him feeling cold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Void Icon was used to obscure the future during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The nature of the Void Icon is to subtract or remove.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon could not figure out how to make the Void Icon recognize bringing something back from total destruction as removing damage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The Void Icon can be used to restore a house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Void Icon approved of Lindon's actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Void Icon resonated with the Death Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — The Void Icon's authority was used by Lindon to construct a meeting-space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — The Silverlord has a similarity to the Void Icon.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Void Icon provides comfort to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The authority of the Void Icon suffused Lindon's technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon holds the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon uses the Void Icon to mask his thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Void Icon provides Lindon with senses that allow him to feel the process of shaping materials in the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon tapped into the Hammer Icon and the Void Icon together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Void Icon possesses the desire to bring something out of nothing.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
